creator: Nathan Hodgson
caption:
Comment “PROSPECT” to get this lead gen connector. 

Finding quality leads takes forever—and the tools are either outdated or way too complicated. 

Vibe Prospecting is a Claude connector that turns your Claude chats into a full prospecting system. 

1. Open Claude and connect Vibe Prospecting 
2. Ask it to find leads (e.g., “find me 50 UK SaaS founders”) 
3. It pulls from 50+ data sources with verified contact info 
4. You get full lists with emails, phone numbers, and company data 
5. Save to their Hub, export, enrich, or filter anytime 
6. No need to touch your CRM 

I tried it and built a solid B2B list in under 2 minutes. 

What makes it different? 
It turns Claude into a lead gen machine powered by 800M+ verified professional profiles. 

• Build targeted lead lists fast 
• Get real-time company and contact info 
• Export and filter without extra tools 
• Works seamlessly inside Claude 
• Replace 3–4 other lead tools easily
